name: Skyone
description: Skyone — Brazilian cloud platform offering IaaS, managed databases, and DevOps tools for enterprise workloads.

seo.title: Skyone — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Skyone: Skyone — Brazilian cloud platform offering IaaS, managed databases, and DevOps tools for enterprise workloads.

when_to_use: Brazilian enterprise cloud with managed databases and DevOps
IaaS and PaaS for Brazilian companies needing local data residency
Managed Kubernetes and CI/CD for Brazilian software teams
Cloud hosting with LGPD-compliant Brazilian data centers
Full-stack cloud services for Latin American enterprise orgs

review.verdict: Reasonable Brazilian cloud for local enterprises, but struggles to compete beyond regional borders.
review.best_for: Brazilian enterprises needing local cloud with Portuguese support and data residency
review.not_for: Global products or teams comfortable with AWS's São Paulo region
